reviews.review_description: Perfect horror game :-)
Can only play for 10 mins and my galaxy s6 overheats. Never had this problem with any other games.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for playing TCAD! The game has been tested on all devices and no thermal issue is present overall. Please make sure to stop all apps running before playing, since any of those might lead to overheat issues. KR Games

reviews.review_description: What do I do next? I'm a few minutes in, I break the glass and get a map, I can't figure out what to do next. I walk every where but I can't figure it out. Help me please oh and I lose sound as soon as I pick up flashlight.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thank you for playing our games!
After having collected the map and all the necessary stuff, just go to the church door and open it...have fun!
KR Games

reviews.review_title: Error de volumen. No se guarda progreso
reviews.review_description: The game locks up  and stop working. Sometimes the volume does not work. The most important is that it does not allow to save the progress of the game. Every time you play, you have to start from far behind.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, 
thank you for playing our games!
There is a known bug when Android notifications come to screen.
We are working on this and a patch will be released soon. 
Please play the game in airplane mode at the moment in order to enjoy the experience without killing the audio.
KR Games

reviews.review_description: Even better then the first chapter....like really guys this is how horror vr games have to be done!!! Really good graphics + jump scares are insane + sound and everything is so immersive! Its a must buy!!!
The atmosphere was very scary, but slightly disappointed with the models, overall, worth every penny :-)
please help. have bought this trilogy and the other 2 stories have installed but not this on. galaxys7

developer_response.body: Hi there, please make sure you have got space enough on your device! Thanks, KR Games

reviews.review_description: Great horror game, part 2 of 3.
Loved The Hospital,  and this one as well.   Seemed a bit longer than the hospital, and a bit  better/creepier atmosphere.   Some GREAT scares!!!    A+!!!

I liked the setting of the church. The height in it is so impressive but during the story it is very dark. 

It would be so nice that you be able to visit the church during the daytime at the beginning of the game or maybe after you finished the game as a bonus, minus the cathacomps. Would be great to see the church in more detail and also to climb up to the roof and look down without the horror adrenalin rush
sound cut off completely after a notification came in. got to restart the whole game each time when any notification came in. running it on s8+ with 2017 gear vr.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, 
thank you for playing our games!
There is a known bug when Android notifications come to screen.
We are working on this and a patch will be released soon. 
Please play the game in airplane mode at the moment in order to enjoy the experience without killing the audio.
KR Games

reviews.review_description: I am fed up downloading games with no turn options .DEVS please tell us we need to stand up for the game or own a swivel chair some of us can do neither.better still add a swipe to turn feature how hard can it be???? Daedalus works great sitting down take note devs we don't have rubber necks and don't all have gaming chairs .
Looks likes a great experience however it is glitching bad on S8
Really a great game
This game even with the oculus go controller gives you motion sickness with all the moving about, thote it suppose to be comfortable rating?

Really fun horror game. I downloaded previously and wasn't compatible with Go controller but that has been sorted. The game has a sense of dread and menace which builds as the game progresses and doesn't overly rely on jump scares. Decent graphics and sound effects. I really enjoyed the sense of walking around the cathedral, looking up at its height and exploring the dimly lit corridors. Only issue was navigating the inventory wasn't very clear and selecting items to pick up in the game was hit and miss. Cool game which builds to an exciting climax. Recommended for horror fans.
Is there anyway I can save my games using a SteelSeries Stratus XL gamepad with my Oculus Go??????
Its a fun little game. Everything I love about low end VR
It's a scary and very nice textured architecture design. But it's too short than I expected.

reviews.review_title: i didn't know what to do
reviews.review_description: Hi guys i did not quiet know what to do in this game i mean i would have to sit there for a long time to get to know what to do and how to play this game so i would not suggest this game to people with no pashens like me i want to get a refund but i dont know how to so if anyone could tell me that would be grate 👍
